view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for one offer version exposing multiple admission paths is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for one offer version exposing multiple admission paths is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided demonstrates that the system allows a single offer version to handle both queue and online bookings simultaneously. The linked use case describes a scenario where a barbershop sells one 'Men’s Haircut' offer that accommodates walk-ins and online bookings without creating duplicates, fulfilling the requirement of multiple admission paths. Additionally, the successful execution of prior steps, such as 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-join-waitlist-flow', confirms that both admission methods are operational under the same offer version.
